content.en:
"Sure enough, when you become an adult, you get even better inheritances, and these inheritances are enough to make a clansman not have any confusion before he becomes a king. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In the years that followed, he would learn these inheritances in the Eagle Department with peace of mind, and then refine his ultimate path of ten thousand laws and those ultimate arcane arts of his own, so that these ultimate arcane arts would be more suitable for this era.

As time passed, his body grew stronger, and on this day, he successfully comprehended the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws.

Comprehending the ultimate rule, in this era, he is not considered a king-level, but in his time, he can be regarded as an ancient-level ultimate realm master comparable to the general level.

And in this era, the physical body must be raised to the limit of the general level, and then comprehend the ultimate rules, so as to trigger the transformation of the ultimate body.

That's the difference between the two eras.

To put it simply, in this era, it is easy to comprehend the ultimate rule, because the heavens and the earth are full of ultimate particles, and it is naturally not difficult to comprehend the ultimate rule.

In his time, there were very few places that contained the ultimate rules, and it was extremely difficult to see the ultimate particles, and the rules of heaven and earth would change, and he only needed to comprehend the ultimate rules, and 24 would transform his physical body and become an ancient ultimate realm master.

That's the difference between the two eras!

In terms of difficulty, in the Ultimate Ancient Demon Era, it was not difficult to become a king, and it was definitely much easier than breaking through to the Ancient Ultimate Realm in his era.

And refining the physical body requires resources, and it is difficult for the ultimate body to be elevated just by relying on perception and absorbing the ultimate particles.

And as a member of the Eagle Ministry, he can't continue to cultivate silently all the time, he still needs to do things for the development of the Eagle Ministry, and he also needs to obey the arrangements of the patriarch.

this day.

Patriarch Heying called Ye Tian.

"God, you are already a general-level existence, and the current development of the tribe still needs manpower, I want you to guard the Nome vein!"

Tsurukage commanded.

Nome Vein!

Ye Tian knew that this vein was an industry of the Eagle Ministry, and it was still a relatively important industry, rich in the material of Nome's gold.

Nome's Gold is a material suitable for crafting the ultimate weapon, and is very popular in the Abyss of Arromu.

The Eagle Department mined the gold of Nome and sold it in exchange for other resources to supply the strong people in the clan to cultivate.

So, Nome's Gold is very important.

However, it is not easy to keep an industry like Nome's Gold, and it needs to be guarded by many clansmen, otherwise there will be some strong people to snatch it.

For example, Youzu!

The Youzu is not a tribe, it is a traitor of some tribes or the remnants of a destroyed tribe, without its own tribe, wandering around and robbing the resources of major tribes to improve their strength.

In Ye Tian's words, it was a group of robbers.

And there are some strong people among the Youclan, and there are even king-level existences, and even emperor-level.

Of course, the existence of the emperor level is still rare and not easy to see.

It is a common thing to guard the Nome vein and rob the gold of Nome when encountering a general-level attack, and if you are unlucky, you will also encounter the existence of a king-level.

At present, the Nome vein has a king-level and a number of general-level guards, but the Nome vein is very large, and the king-level town alone cannot be guarded, and there must be multiple general-level guards.

And now, there is a shortage of people on the side of the Nome vein, although Ye Tian has only recently broken through to the general level, but he is also a general, and there is no problem in being in charge of guarding.

"Yes, Patriarch!"

Ye Tianying said.

For him, wherever he goes, it's all about cultivating, guarding the Nom vein, and not allowing him to leave, he just cultivates there.

Soon, Ye Tian left the Eagle Department and headed for the Nome Vein.

......

"This is the Nome Vein!"

Ye Tian saw a majestic, continuous huge mountain range running through the void, countless ultimate particles were distorted here, and a strange force sealed the surroundings, making the suppression here extremely great.

And that strange power should come from Nome's Gold.

Wow!!!!!

Some clansmen appeared, and they were some clansmen of the soldier level, all of whom had passed the coming-of-age ceremony, but had not yet broken through to the top level of the general.

These tribesmen were also sent here to patrol and mine the veins.

At this moment, Ye Tian was intercepted by them.

When Ye Tian took out the token, these clansmen said respectfully: "I've seen the town guard!"

The town guard of the Nome vein is a general-level existence, and his status is still extremely high.

"I've seen Elder Tuo!"

A white-haired young man sitting on the throne in front of the Ye Heavenly King said respectfully.

"God, I know you, you broke through to the general level at a young age, which is very good, and you are expected to become a king in the future. You guard Area 76, and if you have any questions, you can always come to Elder Ben!"

Elder Tuo said.

"Yes, Elder Tuo!"

Ye Tian immediately retired and went to Area 76.

Area 76 is also very large, and as soon as he arrived here, a top-level clansman came to meet him.

"I've seen the Keeper!"

Top soldier level Saya said respectfully.

"Tell me about the situation in Area 76!" Ye Tian sat down and asked.

Saya's hurriedly introduced: "Lord Guard, there are a total of 3,695 soldier-level miners in Area 76, 176 mining holes, and twelve large arrays, and there are currently more than 3 million pieces of Noum's gold ore stored in the warehouse, which have not yet been refined into Noum's gold, as well as other treasures......"

"3,695 soldier-level miners, how much is this 210?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Due to the shrouded formation here, coupled with the suppression of the Nome ore vein, his ultimate will could not explore the entire 76th area, and it was not clear that there were so many troop levels here.

But as far as he knows, there are not too many people in the Eagle Tribe, and there are so many troop levels in this No. 76 area, so how many troop levels does the entire Nome vein have?

That's not the right amount!

Saya's hurriedly explained: "Lord Guardian, only one percent of these ranks belong to our Eagle Tribe, and the others are not members of the Eagle Tribe!"

"Not from the Eagle Tribe, where did that come from?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

Saya added, "It's a small tribe belonging to the Eagle Ministry, and it's responsible for digging up the gold veins of Nome for our Eagle Ministry, so as to obtain our protection. "

"I see. "

Ye Tian had never learned about this knowledge, and this was the first time he had learned about it.

Afterwards.

Saya introduced a lot of information to Ye Tian and let him know a lot of things here.

"Lord Keeper, your job is to be responsible for the safety of this place, as well as to refine the gold of Nom, the gold ore of Nom is very tough, it takes a long time to refine the gold of Nom from it, and the gold of Nom, the Lord of the Town Warden can keep one-tenth, and hand over the rest to the clan. Saya introduced.

"I see!"

Ye Tianying said.
